title: 10cm/3Pcs Christmas Baubles Shatterproof Dark Grey, Christmas Tree Decorations Ball Ornaments Balls Xmas Hanging Decorations Holiday Decor - Shiny,Matte,Glitter
features: 🎄🎅 This pack contains 3 dark grey baubles an assortment of glitter, matte and shiny surface finish. Each bauble measures approximately 10cm and comes with a silver top with a silver string loop attached.

🎄🎅 These Christmas decorations are made of durable plastic to provide a shatterproof, safe finish compared with more traditional glass counterparts. They give the appearance, glitz and glam of glass ornaments without the risk!
🎄🎅 They can also be used to make a garland by threading string or ribbon through the top and hanging them up in the window, from the mantel piece or on the wall.
🎄🎅 Widely used: The durable ball ornaments can be used for indoor & outdoor Christmas decorations, such as Christmas tree, patio, porch
🎄🎅 These Christmassy baubles come in a handy box that they can be stored away in for next year.
description: 【Exquisite Christmas gifts and decorations】: These Christmas craft baubles are very suitable for giving to family and friends, Perfect decoration for Christmas tree, also used to decorate the Christmas wreath also to dress for different occasions. 【Usage Scenarios】: These beautiful shatterproof baubles are perfect for decoration in house, hotel, restaurant, office buildings and so on. Which can be used to dress up a Christmas tree, garland, or dining table to give you a strong Christmas atmosphere, or use to Christmas, wedding, party, anniversary, and festivals to create a dreamy feeling, it will be a best decorative objects.
